---
title: "Patrick A. Molligo"
subtitle: "Visiting Assistant Professor of Economics, Penn State University"
image: images/main_headshot.jpg
body-classes: home

about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 15em

  links:
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: CV
      href: files/Molligo_CV.pdf

    - icon: mortarboard
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=etF9XScAAAAJ      

    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/pmolligo

    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/patrick-molligo 

    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:pmolligo@gmail.com

---


I am an economist specializing in applied microeconomics, labor economics, and economic history. My research examines education, workforce development, and public policy, with particular attention to vocational training and the G.I. Bill.
